title: [RPT] Resource Packs Tweaks
description: Some useful tweaks for resource pack's items
body:
# RPT - Resource Pack Tweaks

mod adds some useful tweaks for item models creaftion

![some tweaks](https://i.postimg.cc/wjgN3GrX/rpt-demo.gif)

this is some of it:
1) Templates system
2) Variables system
3) Regex, custom flags
4) Arm animations
5) **And much more!**


You can explore all possibilities on [RPF & RPF Docs](https://danrus1100.github.io/rtp-rpf-docs/)
